notes: v328 adds detailed asset retarget candidates for player sprites, region cards, node maps, battle backgrounds, and source files.
v328 adds a quick-check guard that validates asset retarget candidates against asset manifest entries, slot references, mapped target ids, and file existence.
v327 adds localization text retarget candidates for profile, static shell, character creation, runtime UI, data names, region descriptions, and shop notes.
v327 adds a quick-check guard that validates those text retarget paths against the ko-KR localization dictionary.
v326 adds a hunter-to-murim id mapping template for retargeting content ids without changing live save keys yet.
v326 adds a quick-check guard that validates retarget mapping coverage, target id format, and source profile alignment.
v325 adds a content id retarget candidate list for hunter-to-murim equipment, skills, monsters, regions, gate maps, shop ids, and assets.
v325 adds a quick-check guard that validates those retarget candidates against the live content data tables.
v324 adds profile-level theme term sets for hunter and murim retargeting.
v323 makes the in-app update apply action choose the APK update package from the Android app shell instead of opening the hosted web game.
v322 adds a reusable murim content profile template that shares the same swap boundaries as the active hunter profile.
v321 adds balanceTuning swap boundaries to the content profile for theme and balance retargeting.
v320 moves shop pricing and equipment scoring coefficients into balance/equipmentValueBalance.js.
v319 localizes the remaining first-paint static HTML theme terms for easier hunter-to-murim content swapping.
v318 adds a content profile boundary for reusing the idle RPG engine with alternate themes such as Korean fantasy murim.
v316 moves player growth, initial stat, and bulk stat deallocation tuning values into balance/playerGrowthBalance.js.
v315 moves hyper scaling formula coefficients into balance/combatBalance.js.
v314 moves growth objective rotation, notice length, and combat readiness thresholds into state/growthObjectiveConfig.js.
v313 moves combat display effect, defeated-target preview, and formation limits into combat/combatDisplayConfig.js.
v312 moves emergency recovery trigger and healing formula tuning into balance/skillBalanceData.js.
v311 moves passive recovery elapsed-time clamp tuning into balance/recoveryBalance.js.
v310 moves app render, ticker, slot sync, and log limit settings into app/appRuntimeConfig.js.
v309 moves combat runtime timing and hyper cap tuning values into balance/combatBalance.js.
v308 moves break gauge initial values and skill break damage tuning into balance/combatBalance.js.
v307 moves passive recovery, defeat recovery, and offline reward tuning values into balance modules.
v306 moves hyper charge tuning values into balance/combatBalance.js.
v305 moves skill stat and trigger balance data into balance/skillBalanceData.js.
v304 moves player and enemy damage formula coefficients into balance/damageBalance.js.
v303 moves monster level, stat, reward, and drop balance data into balance/monsterBalanceData.js.
v302 moves item stat and option balance data into balance/itemBalanceData.js.
v301 moves monster stat formula coefficients into balance/monsterStatBalance.js.
v300 moves player stat formula coefficients into balance/playerStatBalance.js.
v299 moves rank and hyper combat balance constants into balance/combatBalance.js.
v298 moves reward balance tuning constants into balance/rewardBalance.js.
v297 moves initial character creation stat application into state/profileActions.js.
v296 moves developer option label lookup into state/developerOptions.js.
v295 moves level-up and region-unlock message progression into state/levelUpActions.js.
v294 moves defeated target preview creation into combat/combatDefeatPreview.js.
v293 moves combat developer damage test option adjustments into combat/combatTestOptions.js.
v292 moves shared save-session post-load/reset UI lifecycle steps into app/saveSessionFlow.js.
v291 moves pending new-slot session snapshot creation and restore helpers into state/saveSlotSession.js.
v290 centralizes save slot labels and save status DOM updates into shared helpers.
v289 moves active skill loadout action and skill resolution into a state helper module.
v288 moves view navigation and character creation screen reset helpers into a shared UI module.
v287 separates battle sprite preset data from runtime selection logic for safer module maintenance.
v286 adds transparent class battle sprites and runtime placement presets for mobile combat-card testing.
v285 tightens mobile side padding across game tabs and gives the combat cards more horizontal room on phone screens.
v283 raises tutorial island monster EXP and adds a progress measurement script for 30-minute MVP pacing.
v282 completes manual player portrait position and zoom adjustment for creation and settings screens.
v281 fixes narrow mobile combat controls so stance buttons stay in the normal layout flow.
v280 publishes the current web build and debug APK through the GitHub Pages update channel.
Android debug APK is mirrored under /releases for mobile download testing.
Localization baseline added for Korean UI copy and quiet quick validation.
Public update manifest channel moved to ppippiru2/project-regressor-updates.
Source development can stay private while Android/PWA shells check a public update manifest.
Installed Android shell can keep using the hosted game URL for web-content updates.
Native APK shell changes still require a new APK build.
Android update shell baseline is recorded in data/android-update-config.sample.json.
Mobile dice sprite loading now resolves runtime asset URLs and falls back safely if the image cannot be loaded.
